title: physai container config
description: Schema for container.yaml — per-container build configuration. Fields are merged with project.yaml defaults (container wins). After merging, exactly one of base_image or base_container must be set; both present or both absent is an error.

name.description: Container name. Used as the squashfs filename (/fsx/enroot/<name>.sqsh) and Slurm job name.

base_image.description: Docker image URI used as the base. Mutually exclusive with base_container (after merge with project.yaml).

base_container.description: Name of a physai container whose squashfs image is used as the base. Mutually exclusive with base_image (after merge with project.yaml).

partition.description: Slurm partition for the build job.

gres.description: Slurm generic resource spec for the build job (e.g. 'gpu:1'). Omit for CPU-only builds.

env.description: Environment variables (KEY: VALUE) injected into the container build. Deep-merged on top of project.yaml env.
